resources.string: Disable the annoying green privacy indicator dot when your microphone is in use.
Download and install Shizuku from Google Play. Shizuku allows apps to perform privileged operations without root.
Shizuku needs to be started through Wireless Debugging. Open Developer Options → Wireless Debugging, then follow Shizuku\'s in-app instructions.
Open Shizuku and tap "Start" to begin the service. It will run in the background with ADB privileges.
Shizuku will ask you to authorize Mic Dot Disabler. Tap "Allow" to grant the necessary permissions.
The green privacy indicator is now disabled. This change persists across reboots. You may need to reapply after a system OTA update.
